Cache all directions so they can be used in multiple places but only evaluate once.
Usa posa memorizzata nella cache 'F Input'
Usa posa memorizzata nella cache 'Sprint Input'
Usa posa memorizzata nella cache 'F Input'
Cache all directions + Sprint so they can be used in multiple places but only evaluate once.
Apply Sprinting if not masked. The mask is used in the additive landing animations to improve the sprinting land. If not masked, the knees had the tendency to overcompress and cause IK issues.

Aim Offset Behavior States
State Machine
Apply Aim Offsets or manual spine rotation
Usa posa memorizzata nella cache 'Post Layering'
Usa posa memorizzata nella cache 'Post Layering'

IMPORTANT!!!

The layout of every Animation Graph should ideally be determined by the specific needs of each individual project. Therefore, it is most likely necessary to modify parts (or all) of this Animation Graph and the Linked Layer Graphs in order to meet your project's specific needs. Thankfully, due to the highly flexible nature of UE4's animation system, it is entirely possible to keep/rearrange parts of these graphs (or concepts of this system) while also using a completely different setup.
Additive transition animations are injected here.
This slot should be used for full body movement actions like dodges, climbs, rolls, etc.
Each stance can have its own set of State Machines. The cached locomotion states are inserted into the "Main Grounded States" for easy transitions between stances.

Get World Scale
La destinazione è Componente di scena

Calculate the Crouching Play Rate by dividing the Character's speed by the Animated Speed. This value needs to be separate from the standing play rate to improve the blend from crocuh to stand while in motion.
